creator: clefevre@poboxes.com
text:
ipfilter sample files aren't available if you don't have the
	source tree installed. this patch copies ipfilter sample
	files to /usr/share/examples/ipfilter.

Fix: take care, this patch is in two part. the first one
	has been obtain using cvs diff, and the second one
	using diff /dev/null ...
How-To-Repeat: 	n/a
